data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario regarding rate limiting on auth endpoints.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior related to rate limiting on auth endpoints. However, there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement or confirms the expected outcome. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any relevant data or tests that would support the validation of this specific scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of rate limiting behavior on auth endpoints being tested or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for rate limiting
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the rate limiting behavior on auth endpoints.
